title: SSH Authentication Investigation
content:
SSH authentication investigation playbook for Linux auth logs (sshd).

Triage checklist:
- Count failed vs successful events per username and source IP
- Identify privileged targets: admin, root, ubuntu, ec2-user
- Note time window density (failures per minute)
- Flag Accepted password after burst of Failed password from same IP

Containment options:
- Block source IP at firewall or security group
- Disable account and force password rotation
- Require key-based auth for administrative access
- Enable fail2ban or equivalent rate limiting

Escalation criteria:
- Confirmed login to admin/root after brute force
- Multiple compromised accounts in same window
- Evidence of command execution post-login

Reporting fields: source IPs, usernames, first/last event time, success after failure (yes/no), recommended severity.
